problem.title: Minimum Score of A Path Between Two Cities

approaches.title: Union-Find (DSU) with Minimum Score Tracking
approaches.summary: Uses Disjoint Set Union to track the minimum edge weight in connected components, progressively merging cities and updating the minimum score for the component.

revisions.shortChangeSummary: Initial implementation with DSU storing (parent, min_distance) pairs and a flatten step to propagate minimum distances.
Simplified DSU by removing the flatten step and adjusting merge logic to update parent's min distance during union.
Inlined DSU logic directly into the Solution implementation, reducing code complexity and improving readability.
